allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match "node|npm|tsc|next|esbuild|vite|webpack|tsserver" } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 33368 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, CPU, @{N='RunMinutes';E={[int]\(\(Get-Date\) - $_.StartTime\).TotalMinutes}} | Format-List; Get-Process -Id 9016 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, CPU, @{N='RunMinutes';E={[int]\(\(Get-Date\) - $_.StartTime\).TotalMinutes}} | Format-List)
